title: Iran Says ‘Non-Hostile’ Ships Can Sail Through the Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Ships with no ties to Israel or the United States would be allowed to pass, the government said, but it was unclear if any vessels would try.
summary_public: Ships with no ties to Israel or the United States would be allowed to pass, the government said, but it was unclear if any vessels would try.
